===''Pokémon the Series''=== ====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''==== Marnie debuted in ''[[JN099|Battling Turned Up to Eleven!]]'', where she was revealed to be {{Ash}}'s next opponent in the [[World Coronation Series]]. According to [[Piers]], she was hoping to use her success in the competition to help her dilapidated hometown, [[Spikemuth]], to gain more popularity. While she ended up losing the battle with Ash, the audience was still impressed by her battle skills, causing many to become interested in visiting Spikemuth, much to Marnie's delight. In ''[[JN129|A Flood of Torrential Gains!]]'', Marnie watched Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}}. ====Pokémon==== This listing is of Marnie's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Marnie |pkmn=Morpeko |type1=Electric |type2=Dark |img=Marnie Morpeko.png |epnum=JN099 |epname=Battling Turned Up to Eleven! |vajp=Daiki Yamashita |vaen= |desc={{p|Morpeko}} is Marnie's first known Pokémon and is usually seen [[Walking Pokémon|outside of its Poké Ball]]. It was seen watching the battle between its Trainer and Ash. None of Morpeko's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Hunger Switch}}.https://twitter.com/anipoke_PR/status/1497813751319625728}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Marnie |pkmn=Grimmsnarl |giga=yes |type1=Dark |type2=Fairy |img=Marnie Grimmsnarl.png |cap=Marnie's Grimmsnarl |img2=Marnie Grimmsnarl Gigantamax.png |cap2=Marnie's Gigantamax Grimmsnarl |gender=male |epnum=JN099 |epname=Battling Turned Up to Eleven! |vajp=Shogo Sakata |vaen=Jason Griffith |desc={{p|Grimmsnarl}} is Marnie's second known Pokémon. He is capable of [[Gigantamax]]ing and was used during Marnie's battle against {{Ash}}, where he faced {{AP|Gengar}} and lost. He is housed in a [[Dusk Ball]]. Grimmsnarl's known moves are {{m|Spirit Break}}, {{m|False Surrender}}, {{m|Darkest Lariat}}, and {{m|Stomping Tantrum}}.
As a Gigantamax Grimmsnarl, he can use {{m|G-Max Snooze}}, {{m|Max Quake}}, and {{m|Max Starfall}}.}} ====Achievements==== =====World Coronation Series===== * Rank: 29 (as of ''[[JN099|Battling Turned Up to Eleven!]]'') (Ultra Class){{tt|*|Dropped in rank after losing to Ash}} ====Voice actors==== {{vatable|color={{Hall color light}}|bordercolor={{dark color dark}} |ja=小倉唯 ''Yui Ogura'' |en=Hayden Daviau |he=גליה קורקט ''Galia Correct |fr_eu=Marie Braam |it=Elena Cavalli Carbone |pl=Carolin Mrugała |pt_br=Àlex Constan |es_la=Samanta Figueroa |es_eu=Irene Valadés}}
